name: AS923-1 (915-928 MHz)
description: Asia-Pacific band (AS923-1 plan). Eight 125 kHz uplink channels across 923.2-924.6 MHz plus an SF7BW250 and an FSK channel.
notes: Channels 923.2-924.6 MHz. SF7BW250 on 923.4, FSK on 924.5. RX2 923.2 MHz SF10BW125 (DR2). AS923 has regional frequency-offset variants (AS923-2/-3); this is the AS923-1 plan.
